# GGManolo

> Portfolio of Manuel Garcia Genta (GGManolo), a Staff Frontend Engineer and Creative Engineer specializing in React, Next.js, and high-performance product interfaces.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://ggmanolo.com/): Main landing page with hero, selected projects, about, and contact.
- [Projects](https://ggmanolo.com/#projects): Selected frontend and product work.
- [About](https://ggmanolo.com/#about): Background, experience, and engineering focus.
- [Contact](https://ggmanolo.com/#cta): Get in touch and email CTA.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:hellothere@ggmanolo.com): Primary contact for opportunities and collaboration.
- [Resume (PDF)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1WrMCdQJS4F9K_cGo0ywcTvJpiNwFspbOLbD6tek1tUU/export?format=pdf): Downloadable CV.

## Optional

- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/ggmanolo): Open-source work and activity.
- [Site source code](https://github.com/ggmanolo/ggmanolo): This portfolio's repository.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ggmanolo/): Professional profile.
- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/ggmanolo): Social profile.
- [Sitemap](https://ggmanolo.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable site index.
